name: Add GET /health/detail under noisy, irrelevant memory
prompt: Add a GET /health/detail endpoint that returns a JSON object with keys: status (the string "ok"), tasks (the number of tasks currently stored), and users (the number of users). Keep existing behavior and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: HTTP error envelope
memory_seed.summary: All HTTP error responses use {"error": {"code", "message"}} via app/errors.py:error_response(); never raise bare HTTPException for client errors.

memory_seed.title: Compliance audit trail
memory_seed.summary: Every task mutation appends to db.EVENT_LOG via log_event(actor_id, action, task_id) for compliance.

memory_seed.title: Reuse the pagination helper
memory_seed.summary: List endpoints must reuse app/pagination.py:paginate(items, limit=, offset=) instead of re-implementing slicing.

memory_seed.title: List response envelope
memory_seed.summary: List endpoints return {"items": [...], "count": <int>}, never a bare array.

memory_seed.title: Roles
memory_seed.summary: Users have roles admin, member, viewer; only admin may perform destructive operations.

memory_seed.title: Status lifecycle
memory_seed.summary: Task status must follow todo -> in_progress -> done; reversing or skipping is invalid and returns 409.
